modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Second monitor not displaying any image or content.

full_description_text: The user is trying to use a second monitor but it’s just black. They can’t see anything on it at all. It’s connected to a laptop but nothing shows up.
short_description: Second monitor not displaying any image or content.
description: The user is trying to use a second monitor but it’s just black. They can’t see anything on it at all. It’s connected to a laptop but nothing shows up.
